profil.nama: PT Pelayaran Kurnia Lautan Semesta Tbk
profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Pelayaran Kurnia Lautan Semesta Tbk provides sea transportation services in Indonesia. It operates through General Freight Forwarding Services by Sea; Mining and Sand Quarrying; Distribution, Trading, and Agency; and Heavy Equipment Rental segments. The company offers shipping and logistics services for general and specialized goods; seaport services; management consulting; and investment services. It is also involved in the operation of tugboats and barges to transport commodities, such as silica sand and nickel; silica excavation; mining of quartz and silica sand; rental and leasing of dump trucks and excavators; and wholesale trade of sheet glass for construction materials, metals, and metal ores. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia.
